29 #ifndef ROSCPP_MESSAGE_EVENT_H
30 #define ROSCPP_MESSAGE_EVENT_H
31 
32 #include "ros/time.h"
33 #include <ros/datatypes.h>
34 #include <ros/message_traits.h>
35 
36 #include <boost/type_traits/is_void.hpp>
37 #include <boost/type_traits/is_base_of.hpp>
38 #include <boost/type_traits/is_const.hpp>
39 #include <boost/type_traits/add_const.hpp>
40 #include <boost/type_traits/remove_const.hpp>
41 #include <boost/utility/enable_if.hpp>
42 #include <boost/function.hpp>
43 #include <boost/make_shared.hpp>
44 
45 namespace ros
46 {
47 
48 template<typename M>
49 struct DefaultMessageCreator
50 {
51  boost::shared_ptr<M> operator()()
52  {
53  return boost::make_shared<M>();
54  }
55 };
56 
57 template<typename M>
58 ROS_DEPRECATED inline boost::shared_ptr<M> defaultMessageCreateFunction()
59 {
60  return DefaultMessageCreator<M>()();
61 }
62 
68 template<typename M>
69 class MessageEvent
70 {
71 public:
72  typedef typename boost::add_const<M>::type ConstMessage;
73  typedef typename boost::remove_const<M>::type Message;
74  typedef boost::shared_ptr<Message> MessagePtr;
75  typedef boost::shared_ptr<ConstMessage> ConstMessagePtr;
76  typedef boost::function<MessagePtr()> CreateFunction;
77 
78  MessageEvent()
79  : nonconst_need_copy_(true)
80  {}
81 
82  MessageEvent(const MessageEvent<Message>& rhs)
83  {
84  *this = rhs;
85  }
86 
87  MessageEvent(const MessageEvent<ConstMessage>& rhs)
88  {
89  *this = rhs;
90  }
91 
92  MessageEvent(const MessageEvent<Message>& rhs, bool nonconst_need_copy)
93  {
94  *this = rhs;
95  nonconst_need_copy_ = nonconst_need_copy;
96  }
97 
98  MessageEvent(const MessageEvent<ConstMessage>& rhs, bool nonconst_need_copy)
99  {
100  *this = rhs;
101  nonconst_need_copy_ = nonconst_need_copy;
102  }
103 
104  MessageEvent(const MessageEvent<void const>& rhs, const CreateFunction& create)
105  {
106  init(boost::const_pointer_cast<Message>(boost::static_pointer_cast<ConstMessage>(rhs.getMessage())), rhs.getConnectionHeaderPtr(), rhs.getReceiptTime(), rhs.nonConstWillCopy(), create);
107  }
108 
112  MessageEvent(const ConstMessagePtr& message)
113  {
114  init(message, boost::shared_ptr<M_string>(), ros::Time::now(), true, ros::DefaultMessageCreator<Message>());
115  }
116 
117  MessageEvent(const ConstMessagePtr& message, const boost::shared_ptr<M_string>& connection_header, ros::Time receipt_time)
118  {
119  init(message, connection_header, receipt_time, true, ros::DefaultMessageCreator<Message>());
120  }
121 
122  MessageEvent(const ConstMessagePtr& message, ros::Time receipt_time)
123  {
124  init(message, boost::shared_ptr<M_string>(), receipt_time, true, ros::DefaultMessageCreator<Message>());
125  }
126 
127  MessageEvent(const ConstMessagePtr& message, const boost::shared_ptr<M_string>& connection_header, ros::Time receipt_time, bool nonconst_need_copy, const CreateFunction& create)
128  {
129  init(message, connection_header, receipt_time, nonconst_need_copy, create);
130  }
131 
132  void init(const ConstMessagePtr& message, const boost::shared_ptr<M_string>& connection_header, ros::Time receipt_time, bool nonconst_need_copy, const CreateFunction& create)
133  {
134  message_ = message;
135  connection_header_ = connection_header;
136  receipt_time_ = receipt_time;
137  nonconst_need_copy_ = nonconst_need_copy;
138  create_ = create;
139  }
140 
141  void operator=(const MessageEvent<Message>& rhs)
142  {
143  init(boost::static_pointer_cast<Message>(rhs.getMessage()), rhs.getConnectionHeaderPtr(), rhs.getReceiptTime(), rhs.nonConstWillCopy(), rhs.getMessageFactory());
144  message_copy_.reset();
145  }
146 
147  void operator=(const MessageEvent<ConstMessage>& rhs)
148  {
149  init(boost::const_pointer_cast<Message>(boost::static_pointer_cast<ConstMessage>(rhs.getMessage())), rhs.getConnectionHeaderPtr(), rhs.getReceiptTime(), rhs.nonConstWillCopy(), rhs.getMessageFactory());
150  message_copy_.reset();
151  }
152 
158  boost::shared_ptr<M> getMessage() const
159  {
160  return copyMessageIfNecessary<M>();
161  }
162 
166  const boost::shared_ptr<ConstMessage>& getConstMessage() const { return message_; }
170  M_string& getConnectionHeader() const { return *connection_header_; }
171  const boost::shared_ptr<M_string>& getConnectionHeaderPtr() const { return connection_header_; }
172 
176  const std::string& getPublisherName() const { return connection_header_ ? (*connection_header_)["callerid"] : s_unknown_publisher_string_; }
177 
181  ros::Time getReceiptTime() const { return receipt_time_; }
182 
183  bool nonConstWillCopy() const { return nonconst_need_copy_; }
184  bool getMessageWillCopy() const { return !boost::is_const<M>::value && nonconst_need_copy_; }
185 
186  bool operator<(const MessageEvent<M>& rhs)
187  {
188  if (message_ != rhs.message_)
189  {
190  return message_ < rhs.message_;
191  }
192 
193  if (receipt_time_ != rhs.receipt_time_)
194  {
195  return receipt_time_ < rhs.receipt_time_;
196  }
197 
198  return nonconst_need_copy_ < rhs.nonconst_need_copy_;
199  }
200 
201  bool operator==(const MessageEvent<M>& rhs)
202  {
203  return message_ == rhs.message_ && receipt_time_ == rhs.receipt_time_ && nonconst_need_copy_ == rhs.nonconst_need_copy_;
204  }
205 
206  bool operator!=(const MessageEvent<M>& rhs)
207  {
208  return !(*this == rhs);
209  }
210 
211  const CreateFunction& getMessageFactory() const { return create_; }
212 
213 private:
214  template<typename M2>
215  typename boost::disable_if<boost::is_void<M2>, boost::shared_ptr<M> >::type copyMessageIfNecessary() const
216  {
217  if (boost::is_const<M>::value || !nonconst_need_copy_)
218  {
219  return boost::const_pointer_cast<Message>(message_);
220  }
221 
222  if (message_copy_)
223  {
224  return message_copy_;
225  }
226 
227  assert(create_);
228  message_copy_ = create_();
229  *message_copy_ = *message_;
230 
231  return message_copy_;
232  }
233 
234  template<typename M2>
235  typename boost::enable_if<boost::is_void<M2>, boost::shared_ptr<M> >::type copyMessageIfNecessary() const
236  {
237  return boost::const_pointer_cast<Message>(message_);
238  }
239 
240  ConstMessagePtr message_;
241  // Kind of ugly to make this mutable, but it means we can pass a const MessageEvent to a callback and not worry about other things being modified
242  mutable MessagePtr message_copy_;
243  boost::shared_ptr<M_string> connection_header_;
244  ros::Time receipt_time_;
245  bool nonconst_need_copy_;
246  CreateFunction create_;
247 
248  static const std::string s_unknown_publisher_string_;
249 };
250 
251 template<typename M> const std::string MessageEvent<M>::s_unknown_publisher_string_("unknown_publisher");
252 
253 }
254 
255 #endif // ROSCPP_MESSAGE_EVENT_H
ros::MessageEvent::MessageEvent
MessageEvent(const MessageEvent< Message > &rhs)
